summary: Corruption-prevention lectures more than tripled from 72 in Fiscal 2022 to 240 in Fiscal 2023, which DOI credits to a new outreach effort that brought lectures directly to Department of Sanitation garage locations, reaching over 9,300 employees who otherwise had limited access to its usual e-learning platform. The apparent drop to 120 in Fiscal 2026 is a year-to-date figure rather than a final total; DOI's own preliminary report shows it delivered 64 lectures in the first four months of the year and said it remained on track to meet or exceed its full-year target of 100.

sources.label: DOI, Fiscal 2026 Preliminary Mayor's Management Report
